title: Create: Liquid Fuel
description: Pump in liquid fuel to blaze burners
body:
Have you asked why no liquid fuel input to blaze burner?
![img](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/637/596/video_image-xtwht9ug3.png)

[Full gif](https://imgur.com/a/AYJ92sN)

Here it is!
\
\
This mod have only one simple feature:
\
Allow to input fluid fuels into blaze burners


[Datapack API](https://github.com/RuochenFu21/CreateLiquidFuel/wiki/Datapack-API)
\
\
